title: taraxacum calanthum
intro: Taraxacum calanthum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion genus, characterized by its yellow flowers and edible leaves. The leaves and roots of Taraxacum calanthum have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including their diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum calanthum are attributed to its ability to support liver and kidney function, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders. Taraxacum calanthum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies and dietary supplements.
